zh.Kirkwall Castle, Kirkwall, Orkney Island: 蘇格蘭奧可尼吉可瓦爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Menzies於大約1410年出生在蘇格蘭培爾維姆時，他的父親Sir David Menzies34歲，母親Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle35歲。他於1428年與Lady Janet Carruthers在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1467年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.Kirkwall Castle, Kirkwall, Orkney Island: 苏格兰奧可尼吉可瓦爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Menzies于大约1410年出生在苏格兰培爾維姆时，他的父亲Sir David Menzies34岁，母亲Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle35岁。他于1428年与Lady Janet Carruthers在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1467年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Menzies
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of Manners , in which the z was originally the Middle English letter ʒ (yogh), representing a sound similar to modern English y. The surname is pronounced Meenyus or Minyas in Scotland. The name was brought to Scotland in the 12th or 13th century by a family of Norman knights. It appears that the name was re-interpreted in Gaelic as containing a personal name, and for variants ending -s there is a possibility of confusion with McManus . See also McMinn .

variants.name: Minges
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunter, Kurt.
Altered form of Scottish   Menzies  , reflecting the traditional Scottish pronunciation of that name.

variants.name: Mingus
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Menzies  , which is traditionallypronounced ‘mingiz’.

variants.name: Manners
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnières-en-Bray in Seine-Maritime, recorded in the 13th century as Maneria, a derivative of Latin manere ‘to remain, abide, reside’. See also Menzies .

variants.name: McMinn
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Méinn ‘son of Méinn’, a Gaelic interpretation of Menzies as a relationship surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Menzies was born about 1410, in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Sir David Menzies, was 34 and his mother, Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle, was 35. He married Lady Janet Carruthers in 1428, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1467, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Menzies est né environ 1410, à Weem, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir David Menzies, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Janet Carruthers en 1428, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Menzies um 1410 in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir David Menzies 34 und seine Mutter Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle 35. Er hat 1428 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Lady Janet Carruthers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1467 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Menzies è nato il circa 1410 nel Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir David Menzies, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Janet Carruthers nel 1428, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1467, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Menziesが約1410年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアウィームで生まれた時，父Sir David Menziesは34歳，母Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castleは35歳であった。1428年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでLady Janet Carruthersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1467年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Menzies(이)가 대략 1410년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 위에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir David Menzies(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1428년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Lady Janet Carruthers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1467년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Menzies nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir David Menzies, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Janet Carruthers em 1428, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1467, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Menzies родился около 1410 г. в местности вим, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir David Menzies было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Janet Carruthers в 1428 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1467 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.about 1410–about 1467: e tusa o le 1410–e tusa o le 1467

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Menzies nació aproximadamente 1410, en Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir David Menzies, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lady Janet Carruthers en 1428, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1467, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
